title: aizoaceae
intro: The Aizoaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the ice plants or living stones. This family consists of approximately 1,300 species, primarily found in the arid regions of southern Africa. The Aizoaceae family is characterized by its succulent and fleshy leaves, which help to store water in water-scarce environments. Many species within this family are cultivated as ornamental plants due to their unique shapes, sizes, and vibrant colors.
